landing.heroTitle: Build the business that lets you keep your life.
landing.heroBody: IDesire Academy is a quiet, deliberate program for immigrant entrepreneurs, side hustlers, corporate escapees, and B2B operators. Five tracks. One founder. No fluff.
landing.whatYouGetBody: Most courses sell you hours of video. We sell you fewer hours and more accountability. Every week has a deliverable and a deadline. Every track ends with something you can put in front of a paying customer.
perks: Five tracks, hand-built by Eman — not bought off-the-shelf
Founding members get every future cohort, free, for life
Live cohort sessions in EN, ES, and UR; recordings within 24h
Direct access to Eman in a small private community
landing.tracksTitle: Pick where you are. We'll meet you there.
landing.founderQuote: I built this school I wished existed when I arrived with two suitcases and no plan. Quiet, slow, embarrassingly specific.
landing.founderBio: Eman is a second-generation immigrant entrepreneur. She has founded three companies, sold one, and spent the last decade quietly teaching other immigrants how to do the same. She lives between Lisbon and Toronto.
landing.pricingTeaserTitle: Founding seats are $97 a month, forever.
landing.pricingTeaserBody: There are 50 of them, and when they're gone they're gone. Premium opens after, at a higher price.
landing.faqTitle: What people ask before they say yes.

q1.a: Operators who would rather build a small profitable business than chase venture scale. Immigrants, side hustlers, corporate escapees, and B2B consultants are our four core personas. If that's not you, you'll feel out of place. That's a feature.

q2.q: Do I have to attend live?
q2.a: No. Live sessions are recorded and posted within 24 hours, with transcripts in EN/ES/UR. The community runs async by default.

q3.a: $97/mo locked in forever, even when we raise prices. Lifetime access to every future cohort and every new track. A private channel with Eman. And the right to call yourself founding member #1 through #50.

q4.a: Yes, any time. You keep access until the end of the billing period. We do not play retention games.

q5.a: Full refund in the first 14 days, no questions, no forms. After that, we believe in the work and so should you.

auth.signupBody: Create an account to claim a founding seat or browse the curriculum.
auth.loginBody: Sign in to continue where you left off.
auth.resetSent: If that email exists, we've sent a reset link.
auth.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account.

tracks.lockedNotice: Subscribe to unlock the full course.

pricing.title: Two ways to join. One door.
pricing.subtitle: Founding seats are capped at 50 and disappear when they're gone. Premium opens after.
